quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A high pressure system of toxic masculinity built over the board this morning, with a boastful anon claiming that feeding his son beef would guarantee him a tall stature and large genitalia.

This brought scattered showers of misogynistic and speciesist comments. A front of caste abuse moved in during the late morning, sparked by a suicide thread that quickly turned into a downpour of slurs and abuse.

The atmosphere remained charged, with another front of caste-based insults blowing in from the west of the board when an image of Karan Kapoor was shared, with claims that he's a South Indian Dalit.

A cold snap of resentment chilled the board's marriage discussions, as one anon seethed about brahmin marriage prospects, prompting a brief but intense drizzle of salt.

The mood on the board remained overcast, with no clear signs of clearing.

articles.title: Anon Boasts of Feeding Son Beef for Height, Dick Size
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread saying they will feed their son beef protein from childhood, expecting him to grow 6ft tall with a large dick. Other anons responded with insults and mockery.

One claimed the OP's genetics, referred to as 'dirty genes,' cannot be changed by diet. An exchange involved personal attacks and ethnic slurs.

Anon called another 'Bhangi,' labeling them a 'filthy subhuman.' The target retorted with a homophobic slur and a threat of physical violence. Some anons questioned the effectiveness of a beef-based diet on physical growth.

One cited 'pic rel,' apparently referring to an image, of people eating raw meat, suggesting genetics play a more significant role than diet in determining physical attributes.

The conversation turned to grip strength, with an anon stating another had less grip strength than a white woman.

This was countered with a comment about the 'poosal kikes in gaza,' seemingly attempting to undermine the initial claim. Anon also recommended goat and lamb as alternative red meats to beef.

Throughout the thread, anons hurled insults and pejoratives, including 'veg cuck,' 'abbo,' and 'cuck.' The discussion remained aggressive and mocking.

articles.title: Caste Abuse Erupts in Suicide Thread
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a brief comment about someone else's failure, accompanied by "nepyaari". Replies quickly turned to caste abuse, with one anon calling another "randirakshak gobar cuck swiss fag" and suggesting they were using caste to hide their own shortcomings.

Another anon referred to a woman as "she is a gorkha. Gorkhas are subhumans" and made a derogatory comment about her genetic background.

The conversation turned to a reported suicide of a woman who allegedly lost a medical seat to someone from a lower caste.

One anon wrote that "Reservations are the real reason" and expressed disgust that a "UC girl" had to commit suicide because "subhuman dalits stole her medical seat". This poster also called for violence against Dalits, saying "Kill dalits".

Other posters engaged in personal attacks and caste-based insults. One anon called another "chutiye" and told them to leave the board, using a derogatory term. Another referred to someone as "dalit shitskin" and used an insult based on caste and region.

The thread also touched on the topic of NEET and JEE exams, with one anon suggesting they would create a list of suicides related to these exams.

Throughout the thread, posters used highly offensive language and made no effort to conceal their use of caste slurs and other abusive terms.

articles.title: Anon Shares Image of Karan Kapoor, Claims He's South Indian Dalit
articles.body:
Anon started the thread with an image and the comment 'Zamn!

South Indian dalits look like this?' Another anon responded with information about Karan Kapoor, a model and actor from the 1980s and 1990s, who is the son of actors Shashi Kapoor and Jennifer Kendal.

The conversation turned to the topic of caste, with one anon stating that Mahars are Dalits from Maharashtra, while Marathas and Kunbis are farmers.

This anon also mentioned that Khatris are a mercantile community and not related to Chamars.

One respondent claimed that Marathas are derived from Mahars, and another stated that Jats, Gujars, Rajputs, and Yadavs are also derived from various subcastes of Chamars.

The thread took a derogatory turn, with multiple anons using slurs and making claims about the caste identities of others. One anon called others 'pongas' and claimed they were trying to claim Dalit identity as upper caste.

Anon also joked about Dalits trying to copy 'Western chads' and another claimed that 'narthie chamars mog the shit out of dravid nigger booman'.

The thread was marked by several instances of casteist language and claims about caste identity.

articles.title: Salty about brahmin marriage prospects
articles.body: Anon made a comment about someone being jealous of not being able to get married to a brahmin woman, jokingly referring to it as 'brahmin pussy.' Another anon responded with a dismissive remark, addressing someone with a derogatory term.
